textByHashes.2788bbc54a874f2ec6a489228de4faa8e0ab3855: Hello, it seems you've found a wild bee hive. I'll pay you to help me rehome them.
textByHashes.6c2314fb946f3aeb960e7659f975068aca7688ac: Oh, well, if you ever want to find out how to help, just ask.
textByHashes.40e6214ea804c66fe168d1585a80e16b54819955: It's easy, simply add logs to the unfinished bee boxes I create. Most common types of log work just fine.
textByHashes.98be839b392676ceb929e46f8a15a8bbbb08322b: Once a bee box is completed I will start a new one, let's see how many of these bees we can save.
textByHashes.1848a31083d62f2d2cfd72622e0043f1027862dd: I'll find a nice new home for those bees.
textByHashes.02cf6a1b4b84b72adc48fc08e76655b55aaa33e9: Come with me little bees I'll keep you safe.
textByHashes.79b46877e71740eb33aaf9d292000c528322bbee: Well, I must be getting on now.
textByHashes.b9427f12d618d4afc8d57e1c6bc783eadabe7e83: I'm sorry to bother you, , but I need some help with a bee hive.
textByHashes.56ee3ebf4387ceeea2a6192ef802d497b5a58d5f: Ah, . I'm sorry to drag you away like this, but I need some help building a new hive for my bees.
textByHashes.97e5823563090a54872daa3971a95f8058b5d2e2: All the parts of the beehive are jumbled up. You've got to put them in the correct order for building a hive.
textByHashes.f313e28d688021ae3823c5bb08fe045b1cbb7db4: No, that doesn't look right. You have to put the parts in the right order, otherwise it'll be no good as a beehive.
textByHashes.f6a2b125a039821fb5d6b9d0d578c7ea2f7bd154: I'll let you have 5 more tries.
textByHashes.b0a8afc9fcafd36a92307ac87c7a48200a13b94c: I'll let you have 4 more tries.
textByHashes.f0bbf310035c1da8ee422327d9667a1eaec9542b: I'll let you have 3 more tries.
textByHashes.e4ad9f2cb8d919ca0b6006cc5f9db67fb2dd7f4b: I'll let you have 2 more tries.
textByHashes.14959b03b7bd5bd0d75067ba2dffeb033dab7b21: I'll let you have one more try.
textByHashes.3cf93d517a350fd346634a84e516fe402ff7e65a: Uh-oh, the bees are fed up with waiting for you to build them a home!
textByHashes.9db32df09e8582a61d53957abb23afbab7bb3656: That's perfect! I'll get some bees moved in immediately.
textByHashes.905d6ee71ca9fff78724860bd024f1b32aa31499: Now, I'm sure I must have something to offer you for all your help...
textByHashes.c28bc8ac74997db9e58a67ee0269f70385e213f6: Sorry, you're not the person I need.
textByHashes.e0dd37205122e0ddd6fc2f4b77732cb336bf5b89: Can I borrow you for a minute, ?
